title: Understanding 748 in Hundreds, Tens, and Ones

steps.instruction: The leftmost digit tells us the hundreds.
The middle digit tells us the tens.
The rightmost digit tells us the ones.
Show the number as a sum of hundreds, tens, and ones.
steps.explanation: Expanded form shows the value of each digit in its place.

title: Building a Number from Place Value Blocks

steps.instruction: You have 2 hundred-flats. What is their value?
steps.explanation: Each hundred-flat represents 100. Two of them make 200.

steps.instruction: You have 6 ten-rods. What is their value?
steps.explanation: Each ten-rod represents 10. Six of them make 60.

steps.instruction: You have 9 ones-cubes. What is their value?
steps.explanation: Each cube represents 1. Nine cubes make 9.
